name: DynaVap - The B
summary: An affordable butane-heated dry-herb vaporiser with a silicone stem, for patients new to the DynaVap method.
description: The DynaVap B is the most affordable way into the DynaVap range, pairing a single-finned stainless-steel tip with a food-grade silicone stem. It heats with a butane torch, needs no battery, and the signature cap clicks to tell you when it is at temperature. The small 0.1g chamber suits microdosing and conserves material, which makes it a low-cost, low-commitment first vaporiser. You will need a torch (sold separately) and a little practice with the technique, but the flavour and simplicity are the same DynaVap appeal at a lower price.
